verification.method: Open this manifest with a cache-busting query parameter and compare buildId plus sourceCommit with the deployed page readout.
verification.cachePolicy: The page fetches this file with cache: no-store and a cacheBust query parameter.
verification.sourceCommitPolicy: sourceCommit points to the v0.30.1 functional release-alignment commit that updates WORLD_SAVE_APP_VERSION after v0.30.0 world dynamics, hidden 100x browser validation, persistence integration and long-run audits were merged; README, codex and this manifest are release metadata surrounding that functional commit.
